title: Login Authentication Error
description: User cannot bypass the 2FA screen even with the correct code.

title: Invoice Discrepancy
description: Customer was billed twice for the monthly Pro subscription.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer is asking if there is a native dark mode for the mobile app.

title: API Connection Timeout
description: Integration with Salesforce is returning a 504 Gateway Timeout error.

title: Missing Data Export
description: The CSV export for Q1 reports is generating an empty file.

title: Password Reset Link
description: User reports they are not receiving the automated reset email.

title: UI Scaling Issues
description: Text is overlapping on 13-inch MacBook screens using Chrome.

title: Account Cancellation
description: Customer wants to close their account and request a data wipe.

title: Bulk Upload Failure
description: System crashes when trying to upload more than 500 contacts.

title: Upgrade Inquiry
description: Asking about volume discounts for a team of 50+ users.

title: Broken Link in Docs
description: The Getting Started guide has a 404 link on page 3.

title: Permission Error
description: Admin user cannot see the User Management tab in settings.

title: Slow Dashboard Load
description: The main dashboard takes over 10 seconds to render data.

title: Mobile App Crash
description: App closes immediately after the splash screen on Android 14.

title: Update Billing Info
description: Customer needs to update their credit card on file.
